ValidationRule.description: Restrict Account owner changes except Admin, Sales Manager and Management profiles.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(OwnerId) && $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' && $Profile.Name <> 'Eficode - Management' && $Profile.Name <> 'Eficode - Sales Account Manager' && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: For account owner changes, please contact the Regional Sales Leader.
